rationale.R1.3: The agent audited each empirical claim against the reported numbers and flagged several places where the evidence does not support — and in one case directly contradicts — what the text concludes.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the accuracy gain is overstated), but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content: the KL comparison is inverted relative to the calibration claim.
